recommendations.title: Enforcement
recommendations.overview: The exact details of what took place while Talib Ben Hassi was in police custody remain unclear. Police officers Jens and Mike are on routine patrol in Svalegården's ghetto when news of Talib's death comes in over the radio, igniting uncontrollable,

recommendations.title: Straight from the Barrio
recommendations.overview: A young drug dealer falls in love while facing disruption among the men in his gang, and being offered a career as a Reggaetón singer.

recommendations.title: Bucky Larson: Born to Be a Star
recommendations.overview: A kid from the Midwest moves out to Hollywood in order to follow in his parents footsteps -- and become a porn star.

recommendations.title: Twelve
recommendations.overview: A young drug dealer watches as his high-rolling life is dismantled in the wake of his cousin's murder, which sees his best friend arrested for the crime.

recommendations.title: Babyteeth
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill teen upsets her parents when she falls in love with a small-time drug dealer.

recommendations.title: Commitment
recommendations.overview: The son of a North Korean spy decides to follow in his father's footsteps to protect his little sister.

recommendations.title: Jakob the Liar
recommendations.overview: In 1944 Poland, a Jewish shop keeper named Jakob is summoned to ghetto headquarters after being caught out after curfew. While waiting for the German Kommondant, Jakob overhears a German radio broadcast about Russian troop movements. Returned to the

recommendations.title: Love & Gelato
recommendations.overview: Lina is about to graduate high school and has her sights set on her future at MIT. But when her mom gets sick, she encourages Lina to follow in her footsteps and have “the summer of a lifetime” in Rome. Using her mom’s old diary as a guide, she explo

recommendations.title: Irena's Vow

recommendations.title: Outlaw
